cases.prompt: 데이터 기반 비디오 코드로 만들어줘. JSON props 받아서 차트 애니메이션 영상 렌더링.

assertions.text: Uses frame-driven animation via useCurrentFrame + interpolate + spring inside Composition/Sequence
Drives data-driven compositions through props and calculateMetadata
Warns against Math.random()/Date.now() and enforces deterministic renders (seeded random)

cases.prompt: render mp4 from react with Remotion and automate it server-side

assertions.text: Renders server-side via renderMedia (@remotion/renderer) or scaled renderMediaOnLambda (@remotion/lambda)
Verifies output with npx remotion studio / npx remotion render targeting Remotion v4
